caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses, wearing a light green embroidered top and a dark necklace, speaks against a plain black background. A small lapel microphone is clipped to her shirt. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a logo featuring a stylized flower and the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking and gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. Initially, her hands are lowered, but she gradually lifts her left hand, extending it outward and slightly upward by the end of the clip. Her facial expressions and mouth movements indicate active speaking as she looks directly toward the camera. The setting remains static, with the woman centered in the frame, while the only movement is her expressive hand gestures and speech.
